name: Toni Braxton
abstract: Toni Michele Braxton (born October 7, 1967) is an American singer, songwriter, actress and television personality. Braxton has won seven Grammy Awards, nine Billboard Music Awards, seven American Music Awards, and numerous other accolades.

about_quotes.speaker: Ruth Brown
about_quotes.evidence: I’ve heard some things by Toni Braxton, I like her a little bit.
about_quotes.doc_title: Ruth Brown interviewed by Michael Woods, Scottsdale, Arizona, March 4, 1995
